What I Do

Services offered

01

Curriculum Design

End-to-end curriculum development from needs analysis through to final materials. I design structured, outcomes-aligned programmes for TVET, corporate, and independent learning contexts -- including lesson plans, assessments, and learner workbooks.

02

AI Training Facilitation

Practical, accessible AI training for organisations, teams, and learners. I facilitate Generative AI workshops and bootcamps that move people from zero to confident -- with real tools, real use cases, and measurable outcomes.

03

Instructional Design

ADDIE-aligned instructional design for blended, online, and face-to-face programmes. I build learning architectures that engage learners and deliver results -- storyboards, SCORM-ready content, LMS integration, and full programme documentation.

04

Technical Training

Structured technical training programmes in IT, computer programming, data analytics, and digital skills. I translate complex technical content into clear, learner-ready material that works for beginners and intermediate learners alike.

Selected Work

Projects delivered

Bootcamp / 2026

AI-Powered Digital Marketing Bootcamp

Shalom Technical College, Benoni

Curriculum Designer / Lead Facilitator / Programme Coordinator

Designed and facilitated a sprint-based blended learning bootcamp integrating Generative AI tools, digital marketing strategy, and practical content creation. Built the complete curriculum from scratch -- delivery plans, activity worksheets, learner guides, and assessment tools. Managed all facilitation, learner engagement, and programme coordination for Phase 1.

80+ learners trained 80 certificates issued 10 LinkedIn profiles created Learners accepted into YAEI x Absa Entrepreneurship Programme Strong learner feedback received

Curriculum Design / 2025 - 2026

Vocara Early Vocational Discovery Programme

Vocara (Pilot: Arcadia Primary School)

Curriculum Designer / Materials Developer

Designed the full curriculum and programme materials for Vocara -- an early vocational discovery initiative using play-based learning to help young learners explore career pathways. Built the Curiosity Mapping Play Environment framework, zone setups for two vocational pillars (Builders and Inventors; Makers and Doers), behavioural observation matrices, and career pathway content. All materials developed from inception.

Full curriculum designed from zero Play-based learning framework Behavioural observation tools Piloting at Arcadia Primary School

Institutional Curriculum / 2026

NCV IT Programme -- Full Curriculum Build

Shalom Technical College, Benoni

Head of Department / Curriculum Designer / Lecturer

Designed the complete NCV Information Technology curriculum across 9 subjects (Levels 2, 3, and 4) where zero prior institutional materials existed. Produced all lesson plans, formative and summative assessments, learner workbooks, POA documentation, and compliance records aligned to DHET and NCV policy frameworks.

9 subjects designed from scratch NCV Levels 2, 3 and 4 DHET-aligned Full POA and compliance documentation

Who I Am

About Shaun

I am a South African educator, curriculum designer, and AI training specialist based in Johannesburg. I currently serve as Head of Department for ICT at Shalom Technical College in Benoni, where I designed and delivered the entire NCV IT programme from scratch across 9 subjects.

My work sits at the intersection of education, technology, and innovation. I design curricula that are outcomes-driven and learner-centred. I facilitate AI training that is practical and immediately applicable. And I build instructional systems that institutions and organisations can actually use.

I am completing my Advanced Diploma in Education (NQF Level 7) at TUT and planning to register for my PGCE (FET Phase) in 2027. Available for freelance curriculum design, instructional design, and AI facilitation projects.

Based inJohannesburg, South Africa
Current roleHOD ICT, Shalom Technical College
QualificationDiploma in ACET, Cum Laude (TUT)
Curriculum Studies98% and 90% -- both Distinction
